Send Birthday Wish To Mubeen

Neechy button par click karke Mubeen ko direct birthday wish bheji ja sakti hai. Note: WhatsApp button use karne se pehle HTML file me Mubeen ka real WhatsApp number set kar lena. Message box bhi add hai jahan visitor apna naam aur wish likh sakta hai.
